title: Getting Started
text: package_metadata pulls metadata DESCRIPTION files package (list packages) organises convenient table. Metadata echoverse suite R packages retrieved default. echoverse name R package, package_metadata automatically recognise special command retrieve packages part suite.
code: meta_echoverse <- echodeps::package_metadata(pkgs = "echoverse") ## Adding all echoverse modules to metadata search. ## Collecting metadata for 14 packages knitr::kable(meta_echoverse)

title: Getting Started
text: can use function retrieve metadata CRAN Bioconductor package.
code: meta <- echodeps::package_metadata(pkgs = c("dplyr","data.table","igraph")) ## Collecting metadata for 3 packages knitr::kable(meta)

title: Getting Started
text: dep_graph builds upon functions creates dependency graph dependencies given R package (selected subset dependencies). Metadata package automatically extracted shown tooltips appear hover respective node. plots, graphs, metadata, saved file paths generated dep_graph returned user named list case like explore .

title: Getting Started
code: res_echoverse <- echodeps::dep_graph(pkg = "echolocatoR",                                      ## Setting show_plot for vignette purposes                                      show_plot = list(r=TRUE,                                                       browser=FALSE))

title: Getting Started
code: res <- echodeps::dep_graph(pkg = "dplyr",                            shape = "hexagon",                            layout = function(graph, pkg){                                visNetwork::visIgraphLayout(                                    graph = graph,                                    layout = "layout_nicely"                                )                            }                            )

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph
text: Create dependency graph set R packages plot interactive network. default, plots packages within  echoverse.

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph
code: dep_graph(   pkg,   exclude = NULL,   method_seed = c("pkgnet", "github", "devtools"),   shape = c("image", "hexagon"),   image = "hex_sticker",   layout = layout_igraph,   colors = construct_colors(),   node_size = NULL,   font_face = "Tahoma",   show_plot = list(r = FALSE, browser = TRUE),   save_path = file.path(tempdir(), paste0(basename(pkg), ".dep_graph.html")),   width = "100%",   height = "90vh",   reverse = FALSE,   recursive = FALSE,   use_basename = TRUE,   add_metadata = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph
text: pkg Package search dependencies . exclude subset main package's (pkg ) dependencies exclude graph. method_seed Method create initial dependency graph : "pkgnet" (reverse=FALSE ) Extracts R packages target R package depends using CreatePackageReport "github" (reverse=FALSE TRUE) Extracts GitHub repositories depend respective GitHub repository target R package using github_dependents "devtools" (reverse=TRUE) Extracts reverse dependencies using revdep. one option provided, first used. shape : String. Default 'ellipse'. shape defines node looks like. two types nodes. One type label inside type label underneath . types label inside : ellipse, circle, database, box, text. ones label outside : image, circularImage, diamond, dot, star, triangle, triangleDown, hexagon, square icon. image : List String. Default undefined. shape set image circularImage, option URL image. image found, brokenImage option can used. "unselected" String. Unselected (default) image URL. "selected" String. Selected image URL. layout visNetwork layout function (e.g. visLayout visIgraphLayout specify plot layout. function must take two arguments: "graph" "pkg". See echodeps::layout_star example. Alternatively, may set layout=NULL use default force-directed visIgraph layout, "layout_nicely". colors Colors graph plot elements. Can use construct_colors function help create . node_size Strategy setting node sizes. Can one : NULL : Sets target package node's size 40 rest 30 <numeric> : User-provided node size. Sets nodes size. <character> : User-provided metadata column name. Scales node size vector numeric values node metadata. font_face Font use plot text. show_plot named list two items: r Whether show dependency graph R/Rstudio (show user-specific background color) browser Whether show dependency graph default web browser (show user-specific background color) save_path Path save plot , interactive, self-container HTML file. width : String. Default "100%". width network pixels percentage. height : String. Default "100%". height network pixels percentage. reverse FALSE (default) Create forward dependency graph (packages pkg depends , packages depend ). TRUE Create reverse dependency graph  (packages depend pkg,  packages depend ). recursive TRUE look full set recursive dependencies. use_basename use repo name label node. add_metadata Add metadata graph using github_metadata. verbose Print messages.

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph

text: pkg Package search dependencies . exclude subset main package's (pkg ) dependencies exclude graph. method Seed method extracting first-order dependencies pkg. node_size Strategy setting node sizes. Can one : NULL : Sets target package node's size 40 rest 30 <numeric> : User-provided node size. Sets nodes size. <character> : User-provided metadata column name. Scales node size vector numeric values node metadata. add_metadata Add metadata graph using github_metadata. verbose Print messages.

title: Create a dependency graph: GitHub — dep_graph_create_github
text: refs Reference one GitHub repository owner/repo format  (e.g."neurogenomics/rworkflows"), R package name (e.g. "rworkflows"). exclude subset main package's (pkg ) dependencies exclude graph. add_traffic Add traffic metadata github_traffic. node_size Strategy setting node sizes. Can one : NULL : Sets target package node's size 40 rest 30 <numeric> : User-provided node size. Sets nodes size. <character> : User-provided metadata column name. Scales node size vector numeric values node metadata. reverse FALSE (default) Create forward dependency graph (packages pkg depends , packages depend ). TRUE Create reverse dependency graph  (packages depend pkg,  packages depend ). add_metadata Add metadata graph using github_metadata. verbose Print messages.

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph_plot
text: Plot dependency graph set R packages interactive network.

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph_plot
code: dep_graph_plot(   g,   pkg,   shape = c("image", "hexagon"),   image = "hex_sticker",   layout = layout_igraph,   hide_tooltip = TRUE,   show_plot = list(r = TRUE, browser = TRUE),   save_path = file.path(tempdir(), paste0(basename(pkg), ".dep_graph.html")),   width = "100%",   height = "90vh",   colors = construct_colors(),   font_face = "Tahoma",   use_basename = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Dependency graph plot — dep_graph_plot
text: g graph class igraph. Warning: Large graphs may slow interact . pkg Package search dependencies . shape : String. Default 'ellipse'. shape defines node looks like. two types nodes. One type label inside type label underneath . types label inside : ellipse, circle, database, box, text. ones label outside : image, circularImage, diamond, dot, star, triangle, triangleDown, hexagon, square icon. image : List String. Default undefined. shape set image circularImage, option URL image. image found, brokenImage option can used. "unselected" String. Unselected (default) image URL. "selected" String. Selected image URL. layout visNetwork layout function (e.g. visLayout visIgraphLayout specify plot layout. function must take two arguments: "graph" "pkg". See echodeps::layout_star example. Alternatively, may set layout=NULL use default force-directed visIgraph layout, "layout_nicely". hide_tooltip Hide tooltips default, show cursor hovering respective node. show_plot named list two items: r Whether show dependency graph R/Rstudio (show user-specific background color) browser Whether show dependency graph default web browser (show user-specific background color) save_path Path save plot , interactive, self-container HTML file. width : String. Default "100%". width network pixels percentage. height : String. Default "100%". height network pixels percentage. colors Colors graph plot elements. Can use construct_colors function help create . font_face Font use plot text. use_basename use repo name label node. verbose Print messages.

title: HTML to PNG — html_to_png
text: Convert interactive HTML widget static PNG image.

title: HTML to PNG — html_to_png
code: html_to_png(   path,   png_path = gsub("\\.html", ".png", path),   res = 3,   vwidth = 500 * res,   vheight = 500 * res,   delay = 1,   zoom = 1 )

title: HTML to PNG — html_to_png
text: path Path HTML file. png_path Path save PNG file. Defaults replacing .html extension .png. res Resolution multiplier. vwidth, vheight Viewport width height. width height virtual browser "window". Chrome expects integer values; numeric values rounded nearest integer. delay Time wait taking screenshot, seconds. Sometimes longer delay needed assets display properly. zoom number specifying zoom factor. zoom factor 2 result twice many pixels vertically horizontally. Note using 2 exactly taking screenshot HiDPI (Retina) device: like increasing zoom 200% desktop browser doubling height width browser window. differs using HiDPI device web pages load different, higher-resolution images know displayed HiDPI device (using zoom report HiDPI device).

title: Merge graphs — merge_graphs
text: Merge list graphs single graph. Can take list igraphs list igraphs, can return merged  tbl_graph merged igraph.

title: Merge graphs — merge_graphs
code: merge_graphs(   graph_list,   node_size,   output = c("tidygraph", "igraph"),   by = "ref",   verbose = TRUE )

title: Merge graphs — merge_graphs
text: graph_list list graphs. node_size Strategy setting node sizes. Can one : NULL : Sets target package node's size 40 rest 30 <numeric> : User-provided node size. Sets nodes size. <character> : User-provided metadata column name. Scales node size vector numeric values node metadata. output Output format return graph . join specification created join_by(), character vector variables join . NULL, default, *_join() perform natural join, using variables common across x y. message lists variables can check correct; suppress message supplying explicitly. join different variables x y, use join_by() specification. example, join_by(== b) match x$y$b. join multiple variables, use join_by() specification multiple expressions. example, join_by(== b, c == d) match x$y$b x$c y$d. column names x y, can shorten listing variable names, like join_by(, c). join_by() can also used perform inequality, rolling, overlap joins. See documentation ?join_by details types joins. simple equality joins, can alternatively specify character vector variable names join . example, = c("", "b") joins x$y$x$b y$b. variable names differ x y, use named character vector like = c("x_a" = "y_a", "x_b" = "y_b"). perform cross-join, generating combinations x y, see cross_join(). verbose Print messages.

title: Merge graphs — merge_graphs
text: Merge tbl_graph igraph.

title: Merge graphs — merge_graphs
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ set.seed(2023) graph_list <- example_graphs() g <- merge_graphs(graph_list) plot(g, edge.label=igraph::E(g)$color) } # }

title: Recursively join a list of tbl_graphs — recursive_graph_join
text: grs list tbl_graph objects. join specification created join_by(), character vector variables join . NULL, default, *_join() perform natural join, using variables common across x y. message lists variables can check correct; suppress message supplying explicitly. join different variables x y, use join_by() specification. example, join_by(== b) match x$y$b. join multiple variables, use join_by() specification multiple expressions. example, join_by(== b, c == d) match x$y$b x$c y$d. column names x y, can shorten listing variable names, like join_by(, c). join_by() can also used perform inequality, rolling, overlap joins. See documentation ?join_by details types joins. simple equality joins, can alternatively specify character vector variable names join . example, = c("", "b") joins x$y$x$b y$b. variable names differ x y, use named character vector like = c("x_a" = "y_a", "x_b" = "y_b"). perform cross-join, generating combinations x y, see cross_join().

title: visNetwork save — visnet_save
text: Save visNetwork object png.

title: visNetwork save — visnet_save
code: visnet_save(   url,   file = gsub("\\.html", ".png", url),   res = 8,   delay = 0.2,   zoom = 1,   vwidth = 992 * res,   vheight = 744 * res,   geometry = NULL,   run_shrink = FALSE )

title: visNetwork save — visnet_save
text: url vector URLs visit. multiple URLs provided, load take screenshots web pages parallel. file vector names output files. end image file type (.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .webp) .pdf. several screenshots taken one filename provided, function appends index number screenshot file name. PDF output, just like printing page PDF browser; selector, cliprect, expand, zoom used PDFs. res Resolution multiplier. delay Time wait taking screenshot, seconds. Sometimes longer delay needed assets display properly. zoom number specifying zoom factor. zoom factor 2 result twice many pixels vertically horizontally. Note using 2 exactly taking screenshot HiDPI (Retina) device: like increasing zoom 200% desktop browser doubling height width browser window. differs using HiDPI device web pages load different, higher-resolution images know displayed HiDPI device (using zoom report HiDPI device). vwidth, vheight Viewport width height. width height virtual browser "window". Chrome expects integer values; numeric values rounded nearest integer. geometry Scaling specification. Can percent, "50%", pixel dimensions like "120x120", "120x", "x120". valid ImageMagick geometry specification can used. filename contains multiple images, can vector specify distinct sizes image. run_shrink Run shrink png.
